mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sensor (id, x, y, installation_height, effective_range, detection_range, install_remark, priority, risk, type, mode, last_sample_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{x}, #{y}, #{installationHeight}, #{effectiveRange}, #{detectionRange}, #{installRemark}, #{priority}, #{risk}, #{type}, #{mode}, #{lastSampleTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, x, y, installation_height as installationHeight, effective_range as effectiveRange, detection_range as detectionRange, install_remark as installRemark, priority, risk, type, mode, last_sample_time as lastSampleTime, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM sensor ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT id, x, y, installation_height as installationHeight, effective_range as effectiveRange, detection_range as detectionRange, install_remark as installRemark, priority, risk, type, mode, last_sample_time as lastSampleTime, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM sensor WHERE id = #{id}
